# Ultimate Puzzle Collection

> A modern, premium collection of 12 classic puzzles for brain training and logic mastery.

## URLs

*   Website: https://puzzle.drdhaval.in/
*   GitHub: https://github.com/drdhavaltrivedi/puzzle-collection
*   Owner: [Dr. Dhaval Trivedi](https://drdhaval.in/)

## Context

This project is a high-performance web applet housing a suite of classic and modern puzzles. It is optimized for zero-latency interactions and provides a consistent, beautiful UI across all games.

## Games

*   **15 Puzzle**: Sliding tile puzzle with multi-tile slide support.
*   **2048**: Smooth merging numbers game.
*   **Sudoku**: Minimalist logic-based grid puzzle.
*   **Memory Match**: Interactive card flipping challenge.
*   **Lights Out**: Strategic light-switching game.
*   **Word Guess**: Semantic and letter-based word deduction.
*   **Minesweeper**: Modern take on board clearing.
*   **Code Breaker**: Mastermind-style deduction.
*   **Tower of Hanoi**: Classic mathematical recursion puzzle.
*   **Nonogram**: Clue-based grid painting.
*   **Whack-a-Bug**: Reflex-based game for developers.
*   **Sassy Simon**: Memory game with personality (sassy commentary).

## Tech Stack

*   React 19
*   Vite 6
*   Tailwind CSS 4
*   Motion 12 (Framer Motion)
*   Lucide React

## AI Interaction

*   AI agents are encouraged to explore the games and understand the logic implementations in `src/components/`.
*   The `SassySimon` game uses a hardcoded personality but is designed to be extensible for AI-integrated commentary.
